     8→	"os"
     9→	"time"
    10→)
    11→
    12→type Status struct {
    13→	Uptime  string `json:"uptime"`
    14→	Version string `json:"version"`
    15→}
    16→
    17→var startTime = time.Now()
    18→
    19→func handleHealth(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    20→	status := Status{
    21→		Uptime:  time.Since(startTime).String(),
    22→		Version: "1.0.0",
    23→	}
    24→	json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(status)
    25→}
    26→
    27→func handleGreet(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    28→	name := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
    29→	if name == "" {
    30→		name = "world"
    31→	}
    32→	fmt.Fprintf(w, "Hello, %s!", name)
    33→}
    34→
    35→func main() {
    36→	port := os.Getenv("PORT")
    37→	if port == "" {
    38→		port = "8080"
    39→	}
    40→	http.HandleFunc("/health", handleHealth)
    41→	http.HandleFunc("/greet", handleGreet)
    42→	log.Printf("listening on :%s", port)
    43→	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(":"+port, nil))
    44→}
